# growthbook_saved_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook saved group by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique saved group identifier (e.g. `grp_...`).

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the saved group is archived.
- `attribute_key` (String) The attribute key the group is based on (list groups).
- `condition` (String) JSON-encoded targeting condition (condition groups).
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) Description of the saved group.
- `name` (String) The display name of the saved group.
- `owner` (String) The userId or email address of the owner.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this saved group is scoped to.
- `type` (String) The type of saved group: `list` or `condition`.
- `use_empty_list_group` (Boolean) Whether an empty list group matches nobody.
- `values` (List of String) The list of values for the attribute key (list groups).
